sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28404" key="drimufage/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δρῑμῠφᾰγ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n28404.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">live on acrid food,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:64" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.64</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:4:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
